name: Section: about
visual: Narrative prose on one side; a supporting portrait, a stats/telemetry card, or a small history timeline on the other. Human and credibility-building.
placement: Mid-page. 12-col split (6/6, 8/4, 7/5). For owner-led firms the portrait dominates; for digital firms a stats card replaces the photo.
states: On-scroll reveal; image may have an offset frame.
animation: Prose fades up; portrait / stats-card slides in from the side; offset frame settles into place.
realWorld: Seal+Co: full-bleed alternating image+text editorial blocks
STG Zürich: heritage narrative replaces imagery
